parsed_output.justification: Mike claimed to be the Seer and stated he looked at two cards in the center. James suggested that if Mike saw werewolves in the center, Mitchell (who claimed to be the Drunk and swapped his card with one from the center) likely picked up a werewolf card. Mitchell's defensive behavior and attempts to divert votes toward Caitlynn further increase the suspicion that he is the Werewolf.
